context: The pandemic year. COVID-19 drove a massive shift to streaming, and TikTok emerged as a hitmaking platform. The Weeknd's synth-retro 'Blinding Lights' dominated, while viral hits like Roddy Ricch's 'The Box' showed social media's chart-shaping power.

tracks.title: WAP
tracks.artist: Cardi B feat. Megan Thee Stallion
